title: Brownfield adoption: convert an existing repo into a RepoPact

acceptance_criteria.text: `repopact adopt` ingests an existing repo's CODEOWNERS, CI workflows, and nested AGENTS.md contracts into RepoPact records, non-destructively (existing files preserved).
Adopting a real existing repository (forgewire, 4569 commits, 19 contracts, 4 CI gates) produces a tree that validates as a conformant RepoPact.
`adopt` offers a read-only --dry-run and is idempotent (re-running skips already-present records); behavior is regression-tested.
